data.body: AC amendment: Test functions must assert exact phrases: (1) 're-invocation' or 'reinvocation' text, (2) '--include-archived', (3) 'read-only' near 'closed', (4) 'flagged' near 'in-progress', (5) 'new or reopened' or 'diff plan'. All must fail (RED) against current SKILL.md before Task d16d-1419 runs.
